audit_items.proof_trace: Both transfers are correctly implemented: residual asset is transferred to `s_feeAggregator` when `hasFeeAggregator == true` (L387-391), and `assetOut` is unconditionally forwarded to `s_assetOutReceiver` (L393-396). When `s_feeAggregator == address(this)` (self-managed mode), `hasFeeAggregator` is false by design — `checkUpkeep` reads `balanceOf(address(this))` as the available pool (L257) and no external aggregator exists to return residual to, so retention in the contract is intentional.
